Package org.bukkit.entity

Interface ItemDisplay

All Superinterfaces:
CommandSender, Display, Entity, Metadatable, Nameable, Permissible, PersistentDataHolder, ServerOperator
public interface ItemDisplay extends Display
Represents an item display entity.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    ItemDisplay.ItemDisplayTransform
    Represents the item model transform to be applied to the displayed item.

  • Method Details

    • getItemStack

      @Nullable ItemStack getItemStack()
      Gets the displayed item stack.
      Returns:
      the displayed item stack

    • setItemStack

      void setItemStack(@Nullable ItemStack item)
      Sets the displayed item stack.
      Parameters:
      item - the new item stack

    • getItemDisplayTransform

      @NotNull ItemDisplay.ItemDisplayTransform getItemDisplayTransform()
      Gets the item display transform for this entity. Defaults to ItemDisplay.ItemDisplayTransform.FIXED.
      Returns:
      item display transform

    • setItemDisplayTransform

      void setItemDisplayTransform(@NotNull ItemDisplay.ItemDisplayTransform display)
      Sets the item display transform for this entity. Defaults to ItemDisplay.ItemDisplayTransform.FIXED.
      Parameters:
      display - new display
